channel.title: LuxeMia - Indian Ethnic Wear
channel.description: Shop premium Indian ethnic wear - bridal lehengas, wedding lehengas, sarees, sherwanis, and suits at LuxeMia

item.g:title: Ethereal Pastel Pink Bridal Lehenga
item.g:description: Step into your fairy tale in this breathtaking pastel pink bridal masterpiece. Handcrafted from the finest Pure Net fabric, this lehenga showcases extraordinary heavy work embroidery that has taken master artisans over 200 hours to complete. The delicate blush tone is achieved through a specialized dyeing process that ensures color permanence and a subtle shimmer in every light. Fabric Details: Lightweight, sheer fabric with a beautiful drape. 100% polyester net with embroidery overlay. Work & Craftsmanship: Heavy Embroidery technique executed by skilled artisans. Color: Pastel Pink. Includes: Lehenga (skirt), Choli (blouse), and Dupatta. Can-can attached for volume. Sizing: Available in sizes S, M, L, XL, XXL. Free Size (up to 42 inches) also available. Custom tailoring available on request. Fit: Flattering fit-and-flare silhouette suitable for all body types. Care Instructions: Dry clean only. Store in a cool, dry place. Avoid direct sunlight to preserve color and embroidery. Perfect for: weddings, engagement ceremonies. Shipping: Free worldwide shipping on orders over $200. Delivery within 7-12 business days to USA, UK, and Canada.

item.g:title: Royal Rani Pink Silk Bridal Lehenga
item.g:description: Embrace the timeless grandeur of Indian bridal tradition with this magnificent Rani Pink silk lehenga. This heritage piece is woven from premium Banarasi silk that carries the weight and drape synonymous with royal trousseau. The heavy traditional work combines resham thread embroidery, genuine kundan stones, and delicate dabka detailing. Fabric Details: Luxurious silk fabric with natural sheen and rich texture. Comfortable for extended wear. Work & Craftsmanship: Heavy Work technique executed by skilled artisans. Color: Rani Pink. Includes: Lehenga (skirt), Choli (blouse), and Dupatta. Can-can attached for volume. Sizing: Available in sizes S, M, L, XL, XXL. Free Size (up to 42 inches) also available. Custom tailoring available on request. Fit: Flattering fit-and-flare silhouette suitable for all body types. Care Instructions: Dry clean only. Store in a cool, dry place. Avoid direct sunlight to preserve color and embroidery. Perfect for: weddings, engagement ceremonies. Shipping: Free worldwide shipping on orders over $200. Delivery within 7-12 business days to USA, UK, and Canada.

item.g:title: Classic Bridal Red Silk Lehenga
item.g:description: The quintessential bridal red that has adorned generations of brides across the subcontinent. This luxurious silk lehenga is a testament to the enduring appeal of traditional craftsmanship, featuring masterfully executed heavy work that creates intricate patterns dancing with every movement. Fabric Details: Luxurious silk fabric with natural sheen and rich texture. Comfortable for extended wear. Work & Craftsmanship: Heavy Work technique executed by skilled artisans. Color: Red. Includes: Lehenga (skirt), Choli (blouse), and Dupatta. Can-can attached for volume. Sizing: Available in sizes S, M, L, XL, XXL. Free Size (up to 42 inches) also available. Custom tailoring available on request. Fit: Flattering fit-and-flare silhouette suitable for all body types. Care Instructions: Dry clean only. Store in a cool, dry place. Avoid direct sunlight to preserve color and embroidery. Perfect for: weddings, engagement ceremonies. Shipping: Free worldwide shipping on orders over $200. Delivery within 7-12 business days to USA, UK, and Canada.

item.g:title: Ivory Dreamscape Net Bridal Lehenga
item.g:description: For the modern bride who dares to redefine tradition. This pristine ivory Heavy Net lehenga represents the new era of bridal fashion, where classic silhouettes meet contemporary color palettes. The sequins and embroidery work creates a dreamlike shimmer. Fabric Details: Structured net fabric with more body than regular net. Holds shape beautifully. Work & Craftsmanship: Sequins Embroidery technique executed by skilled artisans. Color: Ivory. Includes: Lehenga (skirt), Choli (blouse), and Dupatta. Can-can attached for volume. Sizing: Available in sizes S, M, L, XL, XXL. Free Size (up to 42 inches) also available. Custom tailoring available on request. Fit: Flattering fit-and-flare silhouette suitable for all body types. Care Instructions: Dry clean only. Store in a cool, dry place. Avoid direct sunlight to preserve color and embroidery. Perfect for: weddings, engagement ceremonies. Shipping: Free worldwide shipping on orders over $200. Delivery within 7-12 business days to USA, UK, and Canada.

item.g:title: Lavender Mist Bridal Lehenga
item.g:description: A contemporary masterpiece that breaks the traditional color boundaries while maintaining the grandeur expected of bridal couture. This serene lavender Pure Net bridal ensemble speaks to the bride with a discerning eye for unique beauty. Fabric Details: Lightweight, sheer fabric with a beautiful drape. 100% polyester net with embroidery overlay. Work & Craftsmanship: Heavy Work technique executed by skilled artisans. Color: Lavender. Includes: Lehenga (skirt), Choli (blouse), and Dupatta. Can-can attached for volume. Sizing: Available in sizes S, M, L, XL, XXL. Free Size (up to 42 inches) also available. Custom tailoring available on request. Fit: Flattering fit-and-flare silhouette suitable for all body types. Care Instructions: Dry clean only. Store in a cool, dry place. Avoid direct sunlight to preserve color and embroidery. Perfect for: weddings, engagement ceremonies. Shipping: Free worldwide shipping on orders over $200. Delivery within 7-12 business days to USA, UK, and Canada.

item.g:title: Metallic Silver Celebration Lehenga
item.g:description: Make an unforgettable entrance in this stunning metallic silver Pure Net lehenga that commands attention and admiration in equal measure. The lustrous silver base is achieved through an innovative weaving technique. Fabric Details: Lightweight, sheer fabric with a beautiful drape. 100% polyester net with embroidery overlay. Work & Craftsmanship: Heavy Work technique executed by skilled artisans. Color: Silver. Includes: Lehenga (skirt), Choli (blouse), and Dupatta. Can-can attached for volume. Sizing: Available in sizes S, M, L, XL, XXL. Free Size (up to 42 inches) also available. Custom tailoring available on request. Fit: Flattering fit-and-flare silhouette suitable for all body types. Care Instructions: Dry clean only. Store in a cool, dry place. Avoid direct sunlight to preserve color and embroidery. Perfect for: weddings, engagement ceremonies. Shipping: Free worldwide shipping on orders over $200. Delivery within 7-12 business days to USA, UK, and Canada.

item.g:title: Burgundy Velvet Wedding Lehenga
item.g:description: Embrace regal sophistication with this sumptuous burgundy velvet lehenga that embodies the luxurious warmth of winter celebrations. The premium Italian velvet has been specially treated for a subtle sheen. Fabric Details: Lightweight net fabric with beautiful translucency and elegant drape. Work & Craftsmanship: Heavy Work technique executed by skilled artisans. Color: Burgundy. Includes: Lehenga (skirt), Choli (blouse), and Dupatta. Sizing: Available in sizes S, M, L, XL, XXL. Free Size (up to 42 inches) also available. Custom tailoring available on request. Fit: Flattering fit-and-flare silhouette suitable for all body types. Care Instructions: Dry clean only. Store in a cool, dry place. Avoid direct sunlight to preserve color and embroidery. Perfect for: wedding receptions, sangeet ceremonies. Shipping: Free worldwide shipping on orders over $200. Delivery within 7-12 business days to USA, UK, and Canada.

item.g:title: Wine Romance Net Lehenga
item.g:description: Fall in love with this intoxicating wine-colored Net lehenga that exudes romance and sophistication. The deep wine shade has been carefully chosen to complement a wide range of skin tones. Fabric Details: Lightweight net fabric with beautiful translucency and elegant drape. Work & Craftsmanship: Heavy Work technique executed by skilled artisans. Color: Wine. Includes: Lehenga (skirt), Choli (blouse), and Dupatta. Sizing: Available in sizes S, M, L, XL, XXL. Free Size (up to 42 inches) also available. Custom tailoring available on request. Fit: Flattering fit-and-flare silhouette suitable for all body types. Care Instructions: Dry clean only. Store in a cool, dry place. Avoid direct sunlight to preserve color and embroidery. Perfect for: wedding receptions, sangeet ceremonies. Shipping: Free worldwide shipping on orders over $200. Delivery within 7-12 business days to USA, UK, and Canada.

item.g:title: Emerald Forest Wedding Lehenga
item.g:description: Channel the mystique of enchanted forests with this breathtaking emerald green Net lehenga that celebrates the beauty of nature. The rich emerald shade represents growth, harmony, and the eternal cycle of love. Fabric Details: Lightweight net fabric with beautiful translucency and elegant drape. Work & Craftsmanship: Heavy Work technique executed by skilled artisans. Color: Emerald Green. Includes: Lehenga (skirt), Choli (blouse), and Dupatta. Sizing: Available in sizes S, M, L, XL, XXL. Free Size (up to 42 inches) also available. Custom tailoring available on request. Fit: Flattering fit-and-flare silhouette suitable for all body types. Care Instructions: Dry clean only. Store in a cool, dry place. Avoid direct sunlight to preserve color and embroidery. Perfect for: wedding receptions, sangeet ceremonies. Shipping: Free worldwide shipping on orders over $200. Delivery within 7-12 business days to USA, UK, and Canada.

item.g:title: Royal Blue Celebration Lehenga
item.g:description: Make a statement of confidence and elegance with this commanding royal blue Net lehenga that embodies the depth and mystery of midnight skies. Fabric Details: Lightweight net fabric with beautiful translucency and elegant drape. Work & Craftsmanship: Heavy Work technique executed by skilled artisans. Color: Royal Blue. Includes: Lehenga (skirt), Choli (blouse), and Dupatta. Sizing: Available in sizes S, M, L, XL, XXL. Free Size (up to 42 inches) also available. Custom tailoring available on request. Fit: Flattering fit-and-flare silhouette suitable for all body types. Care Instructions: Dry clean only. Store in a cool, dry place. Avoid direct sunlight to preserve color and embroidery. Perfect for: wedding receptions, sangeet ceremonies. Shipping: Free worldwide shipping on orders over $200. Delivery within 7-12 business days to USA, UK, and Canada.

item.g:title: Coral Sunset Net Lehenga
item.g:description: Capture the warmth of a perfect sunset with this stunning coral Net lehenga that radiates joy and celebration. Fabric Details: Lightweight net fabric with beautiful translucency and elegant drape. Work & Craftsmanship: Heavy Work technique executed by skilled artisans. Color: Coral. Includes: Lehenga (skirt), Choli (blouse), and Dupatta. Sizing: Available in sizes S, M, L, XL, XXL. Free Size (up to 42 inches) also available. Custom tailoring available on request. Fit: Flattering fit-and-flare silhouette suitable for all body types. Care Instructions: Dry clean only. Store in a cool, dry place. Avoid direct sunlight to preserve color and embroidery. Perfect for: wedding receptions, sangeet ceremonies. Shipping: Free worldwide shipping on orders over $200. Delivery within 7-12 business days to USA, UK, and Canada.

item.g:title: Powder Pink Wedding Lehenga
item.g:description: Whisper romance with this delicate powder pink Net lehenga that embodies gentle femininity and timeless grace. Fabric Details: Lightweight net fabric with beautiful translucency and elegant drape. Work & Craftsmanship: Heavy Work technique executed by skilled artisans. Color: Powder Pink. Includes: Lehenga (skirt), Choli (blouse), and Dupatta. Sizing: Available in sizes S, M, L, XL, XXL. Free Size (up to 42 inches) also available. Custom tailoring available on request. item.g:title: Blush Georgette Party Lehenga
item.g:description: Float through celebrations in this enchanting blush Georgette lehenga that combines graceful movement with sophisticated style. Fabric Details: Lightweight, slightly sheer fabric with a crinkled texture. Excellent drape and movement. Work & Craftsmanship: Sequins Work technique executed by skilled artisans. Color: Blush Pink. Includes: Lehenga (skirt), Choli (blouse), and Dupatta. Sizing: Available in sizes S, M, L, XL, XXL. Free Size (up to 42 inches) also available. Custom tailoring available on request. Fit: Flattering fit-and-flare silhouette suitable for all body types. Care Instructions: Dry clean only. Store in a cool, dry place. Avoid direct sunlight to preserve color and embroidery. Perfect for: cocktail parties, festive celebrations. Shipping: Free worldwide shipping on orders over $200. Delivery within 7-12 business days to USA, UK, and Canada.

item.g:title: Mint Sequin Party Lehenga
item.g:description: Make a fresh statement with this stunning mint Georgette lehenga that brings a cool, contemporary edge to traditional celebrations. Fabric Details: Lightweight, slightly sheer fabric with a crinkled texture. Excellent drape and movement. Work & Craftsmanship: Sequins Work technique executed by skilled artisans. Color: Mint. Includes: Lehenga (skirt), Choli (blouse), and Dupatta. Sizing: Available in sizes S, M, L, XL, XXL. Free Size (up to 42 inches) also available. Custom tailoring available on request. Fit: Flattering fit-and-flare silhouette suitable for all body types. Care Instructions: Dry clean only. Store in a cool, dry place. Avoid direct sunlight to preserve color and embroidery. Perfect for: cocktail parties, festive celebrations. Shipping: Free worldwide shipping on orders over $200. Delivery within 7-12 business days to USA, UK, and Canada.

item.g:title: Champagne Gold Party Lehenga
item.g:description: Toast to elegance with this sophisticated champagne gold Georgette lehenga that embodies refined celebration style. Fabric Details: Lightweight, slightly sheer fabric with a crinkled texture. Excellent drape and movement. Work & Craftsmanship: Sequins Work technique executed by skilled artisans. item.g:title: Navy Blue Party Lehenga
item.g:description: Command the room with this sophisticated navy blue Georgette lehenga that balances classic elegance with modern glamour. Fabric Details: Lightweight, slightly sheer fabric with a crinkled texture. Excellent drape and movement. Work & Craftsmanship: Sequins Work technique executed by skilled artisans. Color: Navy Blue. item.g:title: Marigold Yellow Festive Lehenga
item.g:description: Embrace the spirit of Indian festivals with this vibrant marigold yellow Chinnon lehenga that radiates joy and celebration. Fabric Details: Premium Chinnon fabric with smooth finish and elegant sheen. Lightweight and comfortable. Work & Craftsmanship: Embroidery technique executed by skilled artisans. Color: Yellow. Includes: Lehenga (skirt), Choli (blouse), and Dupatta. Sizing: Available in sizes S, M, L, XL, XXL. Free Size (up to 42 inches) also available. Custom tailoring available on request. Fit: Flattering fit-and-flare silhouette suitable for all body types. Care Instructions: Dry clean only. Store in a cool, dry place. Avoid direct sunlight to preserve color and embroidery. Perfect for: Diwali, Navratri, Eid celebrations. Shipping: Free worldwide shipping on orders over $200. Delivery within 7-12 business days to USA, UK, and Canada.

item.g:title: Saffron Orange Festive Lehenga
item.g:description: Celebrate with sacred energy in this stunning saffron orange Chinnon lehenga that embodies the spiritual significance of Indian festivals. Fabric Details: Premium Chinnon fabric with smooth finish and elegant sheen. Lightweight and comfortable. Work & Craftsmanship: Embroidery technique executed by skilled artisans. Color: Orange. item.g:title: Peacock Green Festive Lehenga
item.g:description: Channel the majestic beauty of India's national bird with this stunning peacock green Chinnon lehenga. Fabric Details: Premium Chinnon fabric with smooth finish and elegant sheen. Lightweight and comfortable. Work & Craftsmanship: Embroidery technique executed by skilled artisans. Color: Peacock Green. Includes: Lehenga (skirt), Choli (blouse), and Dupatta. Shipping: Free worldwide shipping on orders over $200. Delivery within 7-12 business days to USA, UK, and Canada.

item.g:title: Ruby Red Festive Lehenga
item.g:description: Shine with the brilliance of precious gems in this magnificent ruby red Chinnon lehenga that combines traditional symbolism with contemporary elegance. Fabric Details: Premium Chinnon fabric with smooth finish and elegant sheen. Lightweight and comfortable. Work & Craftsmanship: Embroidery technique executed by skilled artisans. Color: Ruby Red. Perfect for: Diwali, Navratri, Eid celebrations. Shipping: Free worldwide shipping on orders over $200. Delivery within 7-12 business days to USA, UK, and Canada.

item.g:title: Dusty Rose Festive Lehenga
item.g:description: Embrace soft romance with this enchanting dusty rose Chinnon lehenga that brings a contemporary color palette to traditional festival celebrations. Fabric Details: Premium Chinnon fabric with smooth finish and elegant sheen. Lightweight and comfortable. Work & Craftsmanship: Embroidery technique executed by skilled artisans. Color: Dusty Rose. item.g:title: Royal Purple Festive Lehenga
item.g:description: Channel regal elegance with this stunning royal purple Chinnon lehenga that combines the majesty of imperial colors with festival celebration energy. Fabric Details: Premium Chinnon fabric with smooth finish and elegant sheen. Lightweight and comfortable. Work & Craftsmanship: Embroidery technique executed by skilled artisans. Color: Royal Purple. item.g:title: Heavy Silk Yellow Mirror Work Lehenga
item.g:description: A radiant masterpiece that captures the essence of sunshine celebrations. This exquisite Heavy Silk lehenga features elaborate mirror work that creates a mesmerizing play of light with every movement. Fabric Details: Premium heavyweight silk with substantial body and elegant fall. 100% silk. Work & Craftsmanship: Mirror Work technique executed by skilled artisans. Color: Yellow. Includes: Lehenga (skirt), Choli (blouse), and Dupatta. Can-can attached for volume. Sizing: Available in sizes S, M, L, XL, XXL. Free Size (up to 42 inches) also available. Custom tailoring available on request. Fit: Flattering fit-and-flare silhouette suitable for all body types. Care Instructions: Dry clean only. Store in a cool, dry place. Avoid direct sunlight to preserve color and embroidery. Perfect for: red carpet events, luxury celebrations. Shipping: Free worldwide shipping on orders over $200. Delivery within 7-12 business days to USA, UK, and Canada.

item.g:title: Heavy Silk Beige Mirror Work Lehenga
item.g:description: Understated elegance meets artisan craftsmanship in this sophisticated beige Heavy Silk lehenga. The neutral palette serves as the perfect canvas for the intricate mirror work embellishments. Fabric Details: Premium heavyweight silk with substantial body and elegant fall. 100% silk. Work & Craftsmanship: Mirror Work technique executed by skilled artisans. Color: Beige. Includes: Lehenga (skirt), Choli (blouse), and Dupatta. Can-can attached for volume. Sizing: Available in sizes S, M, L, XL, XXL. Free Size (up to 42 inches) also available. Custom tailoring available on request. Fit: Flattering fit-and-flare silhouette suitable for all body types. Care Instructions: Dry clean only. Store in a cool, dry place. Avoid direct sunlight to preserve color and embroidery. Perfect for: red carpet events, luxury celebrations. Shipping: Free worldwide shipping on orders over $200. Delivery within 7-12 business days to USA, UK, and Canada.

item.g:title: Heavy Silk Sky Blue Mirror Work Lehenga
item.g:description: Capture the serenity of clear horizons with this breathtaking sky blue Heavy Silk lehenga. The tranquil blue shade combined with shimmering mirror work creates an ethereal ensemble. Fabric Details: Premium heavyweight silk with substantial body and elegant fall. 100% silk. Work & Craftsmanship: Mirror Work technique executed by skilled artisans. Color: Sky Blue. Includes: Lehenga (skirt), Choli (blouse), and Dupatta. Can-can attached for volume. item.g:title: Organza Lavender Bridal Heavy Work Lehenga
item.g:description: Step into ethereal elegance with this enchanting lavender Organza bridal lehenga. The delicate fabric combined with heavy embroidery work creates a masterpiece fit for the most discerning bride. Fabric Details: Crisp, lightweight fabric with a subtle sheen. Creates voluminous silhouettes. Work & Craftsmanship: Heavy Work technique executed by skilled artisans. Color: Lavender. Includes: Lehenga (skirt), Choli (blouse), and Dupatta. item.g:title: Organza Red Bridal Heavy Work Lehenga
item.g:description: The timeless allure of bridal red reimagined in luxurious Organza fabric. This stunning lehenga features intensive heavy work embroidery that creates depth and dimension throughout. Fabric Details: Crisp, lightweight fabric with a subtle sheen. Creates voluminous silhouettes. Work & Craftsmanship: Heavy Work technique executed by skilled artisans. Color: Red. Includes: Lehenga (skirt), Choli (blouse), and Dupatta. item.g:title: Mint Green Kanchipuram Silk Wedding Saree
item.g:description: Experience the grandeur of South Indian tradition with this exquisite mint green Kanchipuram-inspired Viscose Silk saree. The delicate mint shade represents new beginnings and prosperity. Fabric Details: Silk-blend viscose fabric combining the sheen of silk with the comfort of viscose. Easy to drape. Work & Craftsmanship: Weaving Work technique executed by skilled artisans. Color: Mint Green. Includes: Saree (5.5 meters) with Blouse piece (0.8 meters) attached. Petticoat not included. Sizing: Available in sizes S, M, L, XL, XXL. Free Size (up to 42 inches) also available. Custom tailoring available on request. Fit: Flattering fit-and-flare silhouette suitable for all body types. Care Instructions: Dry clean only. Store in a cool, dry place. Avoid direct sunlight to preserve color and embroidery. Perfect for: wedding ceremonies, reception. Shipping: Free worldwide shipping on orders over $200. Delivery within 7-12 business days to USA, UK, and Canada.

item.g:title: Royal Pink Kanchipuram Silk Wedding Saree
item.g:description: A celebration of feminine grace in royal pink, this Viscose Silk saree channels the opulence of Kanchipuram's legendary weaving traditions. Fabric Details: Silk-blend viscose fabric combining the sheen of silk with the comfort of viscose. Easy to drape. Work & Craftsmanship: Weaving Work technique executed by skilled artisans. Color: Pink. Includes: Saree (5.5 meters) with Blouse piece (0.8 meters) attached. Petticoat not included. Sizing: Available in sizes S, M, L, XL, XXL. Free Size (up to 42 inches) also available. Custom tailoring available on request. Fit: Flattering fit-and-flare silhouette suitable for all body types. Care Instructions: Dry clean only. Store in a cool, dry place. Avoid direct sunlight to preserve color and embroidery. Perfect for: wedding ceremonies, reception. Shipping: Free worldwide shipping on orders over $200. Delivery within 7-12 business days to USA, UK, and Canada.

Fabric Details: Silk-blend viscose fabric combining the sheen of silk with the comfort of viscose. Easy to drape. Work & Craftsmanship: Weaving Work technique executed by skilled artisans. item.g:title: Multicolor Kanchipuram Silk Wedding Saree
item.g:description: A vibrant celebration of color and craftsmanship, this multicolor Viscose Silk saree showcases bold aesthetic of South Indian wedding traditions. Fabric Details: Silk-blend viscose fabric combining the sheen of silk with the comfort of viscose. Easy to drape. Work & Craftsmanship: Weaving Work technique executed by skilled artisans. item.g:description: Embrace powerful sophistication with this striking black velvet sherwani. Fabric Details: Premium velvet with soft pile and luxurious hand-feel. Perfect for winter celebrations.
